subcodes.first_line: Whensoever Thy musk-laden Pen maketh mention of Us, it earneth the reward of freeing two hundred souls from bondage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلک مشکین تو هر دم که ز ما یاد کند به برد اجر دو صد بنده که آزاد کند رشحات
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @Word of God and human limitations, @humility; meekness; lowliness
